name: Southern Coconut Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Use Bakers' Cookie Coconut or any good grade of flaked coconut.
2. Blend butter, sugar, and salt in a bowl until smooth.
3. Add eggs, corn syrup, vanilla extract, and almond extract to the mixture. Mix well.
4. Sprinkle coconut over the bottom of the unbaked pie shell.
5. Pour the filling over the coconut layer.
6. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 40-50 minutes.
7. Allow to cool before serving alone, with ice cream, or with whipped cream.
